findings.description: Footnote w:id=2 carries text (55 chars) but is not referenced from document.xml. The footnotes part is loaded by Word and by package walkers, but the rendered document and footnote pane show no indicator because document.xml has no <w:footnoteReference> pointing at this id. Likely adversarial concealment of payload in the footnotes channel.
